COPY.signature: COPY table_name FROM 's3://bucket/path' IAM_ROLE 'arn:aws:iam::role' [FORMAT AS CSV|JSON|AVRO|PARQUET] [DELIMITER 'char'] [IGNOREHEADER n] [GZIP|LZOP|BZIP2]
COPY.description: Loads data from Amazon S3, DynamoDB, or remote hosts into a Redshift table using massively parallel processing for high-throughput bulk ingestion of large datasets.

UNLOAD.signature: UNLOAD ('select_statement') TO 's3://bucket/path' IAM_ROLE 'arn:aws:iam::role' [FORMAT AS CSV|JSON|PARQUET] [PARALLEL ON|OFF] [MAXFILESIZE n MB]
UNLOAD.description: Exports the results of a query to one or more files on Amazon S3, supporting parallel writes across slices for fast extraction of large result sets.

GETDATE.description: Returns the current date and time in UTC as a timestamp value, equivalent to CURRENT_TIMESTAMP but specific to Redshift SQL dialect for compatibility purposes.

DATEADD.description: Adds a specified number of intervals (years, months, days, hours, minutes, seconds) to a date or timestamp expression and returns the resulting value.

DATEDIFF.description: Calculates the difference between two date or timestamp expressions in the specified date part units such as years, months, days, hours, minutes, or seconds.

NVL.description: Returns the first non-null expression among its arguments, functioning as a null-coalescing operator equivalent to COALESCE with exactly two parameters in standard SQL.

LISTAGG.signature: LISTAGG(expression [, delimiter]) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sort_expression) -> VARCHAR
LISTAGG.description: Aggregates values from multiple rows into a single concatenated string with an optional delimiter, ordered by the specified sort expression within each group.

DISTKEY.description: Table distribution style attribute that specifies the column used to distribute rows across compute node slices, optimizing join performance by co-locating matching rows on the same node.

SORTKEY.description: Defines the sort order of data stored on disk within each slice, enabling zone map filtering to skip blocks during query execution and dramatically reducing I/O for filtered queries.

DISTSTYLE.description: Specifies how table rows are distributed across compute node slices; EVEN distributes round-robin, KEY uses a column hash, ALL replicates to every node, and AUTO lets Redshift choose.

APPROXIMATE COUNT.description: Returns an approximate distinct count using a HyperLogLog algorithm, providing significantly faster results than exact COUNT DISTINCT for large datasets with minimal error margin.

CONVERT_TIMEZONE.description: Converts a timestamp from one time zone to another, supporting IANA time zone names and UTC offsets for accurate cross-timezone date and time calculations in analytics.

WLM_QUERY_SLOT_COUNT.description: Temporarily increases the number of workload management query slots allocated to the current session, allowing a single query to use more memory for complex operations.

STL_QUERY.description: System table that logs information about database queries including query text, start and end times, and status, essential for monitoring and troubleshooting query performance.

query.description: Unique query identifier assigned by Redshift.

querytxt.description: Text of the SQL query truncated to 4000 characters.

SPECTRUM.signature: CREATE EXTERNAL SCHEMA schema_name FROM DATA CATALOG DATABASE 'db' IAM_ROLE 'arn' CREATE EXTERNAL DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS
SPECTRUM.description: Redshift Spectrum enables querying data stored in Amazon S3 using external tables without loading, leveraging the Glue Data Catalog for schema definitions and partition management.
